name: banyuan
description: 虽由人作，宛自天开 —— 以画布为山石，以组件为草木，以数据为活水，以 AI 为匠心，造一方数字园林。BanvasGL 自研 2D 引擎 + XiangDi AI Agent（SDD + Harness）+ Banyan 低代码平台。

scripts.build:libs: pnpm run build:banvasgl && pnpm run build:agent
scripts.dev:banyan: pnpm run build:libs && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,gray.bold,#ff9900.bold,#00cc99.bold,cyan.bold" -n canvas,agent,xiangdi-srv,knowledge-srv,banyan "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter @banyuan/xiangdi-agent dev" "pnpm --filter xiangdi-server dev" "pnpm --filter knowledge-server dev" "pnpm --filter banyan dev"
scripts.dev:lunlunglass: pnpm run build:banvasgl && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,cyan.bold" -n canvas,lunlunglass "pnpm --filter @banyuan/banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass dev"
